summary: Named primitive capabilities that procedural operation contracts may reference without embedding implementation code.

primitives.summary: Resolve the effective workspace root from a target path or current working directory.
Load resolved workspace config layered over product defaults and local override state.
Emit the resolved workspace config payload in the requested output format.
Load compact active planning summary when the planning module is installed.
Load compact startup defaults, route contracts, and generated policy answers.
Create a fresh preflight token using the configured token policy.
Assemble startup defaults, resolved config, and active planning state into takeover-safe context.
Resolve configured or autodetected system-intent source hints from workspace config.
Refresh metadata for configured system-intent source hints without interpreting source prose.
Read the compiled system-intent declaration or create a conservative missing declaration shell.
Emit compiled system-intent declaration status and metadata in the requested format.
Render text or JSON output according to the operation format option.
Stop with a user-facing usage error when operation preconditions are violated.
